title: Investigate CI pnpm install reliability
body: CI runs show ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for @/ path aliases in unit tests (vitest), but tests pass locally with identical code. This suggests the CI runner's pnpm install step may be failing or producing incomplete node_modules. The 'Fast Gate' job does not cache node_modules — consider adding a cache step or investigating the install output.
rationale: Module resolution failures in CI but not locally indicate a CI infrastructure problem, not a code bug. This pattern appeared on PR #16 (dependabot commitlint bump) but is unrelated to the code changes.

title: Align @commitlint/cli and @commitlint/config-conventional versions
body: The PR bumps @commitlint/config-conventional to 21.0.2 but leaves @commitlint/cli at ^20.5.0. While semver-compatible, version 21.x of config-conventional likely requires a matching 21.x cli for full compatibility. Consider bumping cli alongside config.
rationale: Mismatched commitlint tool versions could cause unexpected behavior, even if not the root cause of the CI failure.
